name: GOLFTEC Dublin
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting center specializing in data-driven coaching. Utilizing advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, their certified PGA coaches provide personalized feedback and structured improvement plans for golfers of all skill levels. The company offers a comprehensive approach to golf improvement through lessons, club fitting, and practice memberships, with locations across multiple countries including the US, Canada, China, and the UAE.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using launch monitors and motion tracking technology
Personalized coaching plans developed by PGA-certified instructors
Comprehensive club fitting service with access to top golf brands
Practice memberships providing access to training bays with advanced tech
Structured improvement approach with measurable results

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and professional club fitting services with equipment from top brands like Callaway and TaylorMade.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted at GOLFTEC locations.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The time for a full 18-hole simulation can vary depending on the software and number of players, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and instruction, making it suitable for youth golfers to learn and improve their game.
